# IGStoryPeek — Complete Reference

> IGStoryPeek is a free web-based social media analytics platform that enables users to view, analyze, and download publicly available content from Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat — without needing to log in or create an account on those platforms. Used by over 50,000 users across 30 languages.

## What is IGStoryPeek?

IGStoryPeek is a browser-based social media analytics and content browsing tool that helps marketers, researchers, and everyday users explore public social media profiles without requiring authentication. It supports four major platforms: Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat. The platform offers both free and premium tiers, with the free plan covering basic profile browsing and the Pro plan ($29/month) unlocking advanced analytics, unlimited downloads, and AI-powered insights.

Key differentiators:
- No account or login required on any platform
- Only accesses publicly available data
- Real-time analysis with AI-powered insights
- Supports 30 languages including RTL languages (Arabic)
- GDPR compliant and SSL encrypted

## Instagram Tools

### Profile Explorer
Search any public Instagram profile instantly. View bio, profile picture, follower/following counts, and recent posts without logging in.

### Follower Analyzer
Track follower growth over time, detect fake followers using engagement-to-follower ratios, and analyze audience demographics including location and activity patterns.

### Activity Analyzer
Analyze posting patterns including frequency, optimal posting times, content format preferences (photos vs. reels vs. carousels), and engagement timing correlations.

### Stories Viewer & Downloader
View and save Instagram stories anonymously in HD quality. Stories are available for viewing during their 24-hour window. Supports both photo and video stories.

### Highlights Viewer & Downloader
Browse and save Instagram highlight reels. View organized highlight collections without needing an Instagram account.

### Posts Viewer & Downloader
View feed posts privately and save photos, carousels, and video posts. Supports original quality downloads.

### Video & Reels Downloader
Save Instagram videos and reels in MP4 format at original quality. Supports both feed videos and Instagram Reels.

### Comment Viewer
Read comments on any public post without logging in. View comment threads, reply chains, and commenter profiles.

### Likes Viewer
See who liked any public post. View liker profiles and engagement patterns.

### Hashtag Generator
AI-powered hashtag suggestions based on content analysis. Generates relevant hashtags optimized for maximum reach and engagement.

### Relationship Insights
Analyze follower connections, mutual follows, and interaction patterns between public profiles.

## TikTok Tools

### User Search
Find any TikTok creator profile by username. View bio, follower counts, total likes, and video catalog.

### Follower Analyzer
Track audience growth over time with historical data visualization. Analyze follower demographics and engagement quality.

### Activity Analyzer
Monitor posting frequency, identify peak performance times, and analyze content strategy patterns.

### Video Downloader
Save TikTok videos in original quality without watermarks. Supports standard videos, duets, and stitches.

### Stories Downloader
Save TikTok stories before they expire. Download in original quality.

### Audio Downloader
Extract audio tracks from TikTok videos as MP3 files. Useful for identifying trending sounds.

### Slideshow Downloader
Save TikTok photo carousels/slideshows as individual images or combined downloads.

### Video & Stories Viewer
Watch TikTok content directly in your browser without the TikTok app or account.

### Trending Sounds Finder
Discover currently viral audio clips and trending sounds. Track sound usage growth over time.

### Engagement Tracker
Track likes, views, comments, and shares over time. Visualize engagement trends and identify viral content.

## Facebook Tools

### User & Page Search
Locate any public profile or Facebook page. View page details, follower counts, and recent activity.

### Page Analyzer
Comprehensive page audit including engagement rates, content performance, posting frequency, and growth trends.

### Group Analyzer
Evaluate community health metrics including member activity, posting frequency, engagement rates, and growth patterns.

### Ad Library Explorer
Browse active Facebook and Instagram ads from any advertiser. Analyze creative strategies, ad formats, and campaign patterns.

### Stories, Reels & Video Downloader
Save Facebook stories, reels, and videos offline in HD quality.

### Photo Album Downloader
Save entire Facebook photo albums in full resolution with batch download capability.

### Post, Stories & Reels Viewer
Browse Facebook content without logging in. View posts, stories, and reels from public profiles and pages.

### Reactions Viewer
Detailed breakdown of post reactions including likes, loves, laughs, wow, sad, and angry reactions with counts.

### Page Activity Tracker
Monitor page posting frequency, engagement shifts, and content strategy changes over time.

## Snapchat Tools

### User Search
Find any Snapchat user by username. View display name, Bitmoji, and public profile information.

### Score Tracker
Track Snap Score changes over time. Visualize score growth patterns and activity levels.

### Activity Analyzer
Understand snapping habits including frequency, peak activity times, and usage patterns.

### Best Friends Analyzer
Discover top contacts and emoji rankings. Analyze friendship dynamics based on public signals.

### Streak Tracker
Track and monitor Snap streaks. Get alerts for streaks at risk of expiring.

### Stories & Spotlight Downloader
Save Snapchat stories and Spotlight videos before they disappear.

### Memories Downloader
Export and download saved snaps and memories from public profiles.

### Stories & Spotlight Viewer
Browse Snapchat stories and Spotlight content directly in your browser.

### Map Viewer
Explore Snap Map locations, view heat maps of public snap activity, and discover location-based content.

### Public Profile Viewer
Browse Snapchat creator profiles, subscriptions, and public content online.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Features |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0/month | Basic profile browsing, limited daily searches, standard quality downloads |
| Pro | $29/month | Unlimited searches, AI-powered analytics, HD downloads, engagement tracking, priority support |

Annual billing available at a discount. Cancel anytime.

## Technical Details

- **Framework:** Astro (server-side rendered)
- **Hosting:** Vercel Edge Network
- **Languages:** 30 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Arabic, and more
- **Data Sources:** Publicly available data only via official platform APIs and public web data
- **Privacy:** GDPR compliant, no user tracking beyond anonymous analytics, SSL encrypted
- **Uptime:** 99.9% availability target
